en.title: Best Weighted Vests 2026
en.description: The weighted vests worth wearing in 2026, ranked by comfort, adjustability, build quality, and value for walking, rucking, and strength training.

zh-tw.title: 2026 最佳負重背心排行榜
zh-tw.description: 2026 年真正值得買的負重背心，用舒適度、重量調整、作工、性價比實測分級，健走、rucking、肌力訓練都有對應款。

en.description: A 750D Cordura vest with a padded ergonomic interior that hits functional-fitness competition standards using standard or precision plates up to 40 lbs, with die-cut lash points and a front phone pocket.

zh-tw.description: 750D Cordura 車身加上內襯軟墊，用標準或精準配重片可疊到 40 磅，剛好打中 CrossFit 競賽規格，背面雷切掛點還能加掛小包，貼身版型跑跳不晃，這是我心中的最佳整體。

en.description: A thin, contoured Cordura vest with steel micro-weights that adjust in increments as small as 2.25 ounces from 10 to 25 lbs, fitting close to the torso without bounce across a wide range of body types.

zh-tw.description: 薄身 Cordura 剪裁貼合軀幹，鋼製微配重最小 2.25 盎司就能微調，10 到 25 磅之間想加多少加多少，跑步 HIIT 完全不彈跳，各種身形都塞得進去，講調整細膩度它是天花板。

en.description: A 1000D Cordura plate carrier built for rucking, with a padded grab handle, improved lumbar support, a wider sternum strap, and a lifetime warranty, carrying 10, 20, or 30 lb ruck plates.

zh-tw.description: 1000D Cordura 車身專為 rucking 而生，加了頂部提把、腰部支撐墊和更寬的胸扣，塞 10、20、30 磅 ruck plate 都穩，重量壓在背上很平均，還附終身保固，戶外走長距離我第一個想到它。

en.description: A 500D nylon plate carrier that doubles as a ballistic carrier or fitness vest, with padded yoke shoulder straps, perforated mesh, and built-in airflow channels for maximum range of motion.

zh-tw.description: 500D 尼龍車身，戰術防彈板和健身配重片都能塞，肩部軛型軟墊加上透氣網布和內建導流風道，動作範圍不受限，那種軍規耐操感一穿就懂，喜歡戰術風的會很買單。

en.description: A ventilated vest that spreads 10 lbs of micro-weights evenly across the upper body to preserve natural movement, scaling to 20 lbs with snap-in G-Pack panels and adjustable shoulder straps.

zh-tw.description: 透氣網布把 10 磅微配重平均鋪滿上半身，重量感很分散，動起來幾乎不影響原本的動作軌跡，扣上 G-Pack 面板可以加到 20 磅，肩帶能調，質感確實對得起這個偏高的價位。

en.description: A stretchable adjustable vest with a Tyvek base layer and no-bounce steel micro-weights, starting at a 10 lb base with room to double up plates in some pouches for a higher capacity.

zh-tw.description: 彈性車身加 Tyvek 底層，鋼製微配重不彈跳，基本款 10 磅起跳，部分口袋能塞雙片衝更高重量，比 Elite 便宜一截又保有微調手感，預算有限又想要可調的，這款很划算。

en.description: A pre-loaded neoprene vest from 6 to 30 lbs with a simple buckle closure and crack-resistant rubber, backed by over 14,500 reviews that make it the go-to affordable pick.

zh-tw.description: 預裝配重的神經棉背心，6 到 30 磅一次到位，橡膠不易龜裂，一個扣環就上身超好穿脫，Amazon 累積超過一萬四千則評價，想用最少錢入門負重訓練這款最順手。

en.description: An over-shoulder adjustable vest with removable weights scaling from 12 up to 60 lbs, an oversized easy-setup strap, and a lifetime warranty, popular for heavy loading on a budget.

zh-tw.description: 肩帶式可調背心，配重可拆，12 磅一路加到 60 磅，大尺寸肩帶穿脫很快，還有終身保固，想用平價就玩到高負重的人很愛，重量堆很高時要留意接縫耐用度。

en.description: A neoprene adjustable vest that scales from 11 to 20 lbs with six 1.5 lb weight packs, a front buckle strap, mesh back pocket, and a lifetime limited warranty at an entry price.

zh-tw.description: 神經棉可調背心，六塊 1.5 磅配重讓你在 11 到 20 磅之間調，前扣帶好收緊,背面還有網袋放小物，終身有限保固，入門價位就有這些配置，剛開始接觸負重的很合適。

en.description: A one-size camouflage vest with shoulder pads, a phone pocket, and a water bottle holder, offering empty pockets you fill with weights to scale from 12 up to 140 lbs across models.

zh-tw.description: 一體式迷彩背心，含肩墊、手機袋和水壺袋，空口袋自己加配重，跨款式從 12 磅可衝到 140 磅，想要高負重又要便宜的健身老鳥常拿它當耐操消耗品，實用取向。

references.title: The Best Weighted Vests (2026), Tested by Trainers
The Best Weight Vests of 2026, Tested & Ranked
4 Best Weighted Vests of 2026, According to Experts

en.commentary: The weighted vest crossed over from niche gym gear to mainstream fitness staple this year, driven by two trends at once: rucking as a low-impact cardio habit and daily walking as the most accessible health metric anyone tracks. That surge means the market now splits cleanly into three jobs, and the right pick depends entirely on which one you are buying for. For an all-purpose training vest, I put the REP Fitness Strata at the top. It hits functional-fitness competition standards with standard or precision plates, the 750D Cordura shell survives being thrown around a garage gym, and the padded interior keeps 40 lbs from digging into your shoulders during a long session. It does everything well and costs less than the boutique options. If your priority is a close, no-bounce fit for running and HIIT, the Hyperwear Hyper Vest Elite earns its premium. Steel micro-weights let you dial the load in 2.25-ounce steps, and the contoured Cordura hugs your torso so nothing shifts when you move. For rucking specifically, the GORUCK Ruck Plate Carrier 3.0 is the one I trust on long walks, with 1000D Cordura, real lumbar support, and a lifetime warranty behind it. Budget buyers are well served too. The Zelus vest has earned over 14,500 reviews by delivering a solid pre-loaded neoprene vest for the price of a nice dinner, and it is the smartest entry point if you just want to add resistance to daily walks. Spend up only when a specific job justifies it: micro-adjustability, competition compliance, or rucking durability. For everyone else, the value picks do the work.

highlights.title: The REP Strata is the best all-around vest, full stop
highlights.body: It clears functional-fitness competition standards with standard or precision plates up to 40 lbs, the 750D Cordura shell handles daily abuse, and the padded ergonomic interior spreads the load so heavy sessions stay comfortable. It matches the boutique vests on build and beats most of them on price, which is exactly why it takes the top spot for a general training vest.

highlights.title: Buy the Hyperwear Elite when a bounce-free fit matters most
highlights.body: Runners and HIIT athletes feel every wobble, and the Elite answers that with steel micro-weights adjustable in 2.25-ounce increments and a contoured Cordura cut that sits tight against the torso. The load stays locked in place through sprints and jumps, and the fit works across a wide range of body types. That precision is what justifies its higher price.

highlights.title: For rucking, the GORUCK RPC 3.0 is the durability king
highlights.body: Rucking punishes gear over miles, so the 1000D Cordura shell, improved lumbar padding, wider sternum strap, and lifetime warranty matter more here than anywhere else. It carries 10, 20, or 30 lb ruck plates with the weight sitting evenly against your back, and it is the vest I reach for when the walk is long and the load is heavy.

highlights.title: The Zelus is the value winner and the right first vest
highlights.body: With over 14,500 reviews behind it, the Zelus delivers a pre-loaded neoprene vest from 6 to 30 lbs at a price anyone can justify. The crack-resistant rubber holds up, the single-buckle closure makes it painless to throw on, and if your goal is simply adding resistance to daily walks, this is where your money goes furthest.

zh-tw.commentary: 負重背心今年正式從健身房小眾器材變成主流裝備，背後是兩股趨勢同時發力，一個是 rucking 這種低衝擊有氧走進日常，另一個是每日步數變成大家最普及的健康指標，走路順便加負重的人一下子多了起來。市場需求變大之後，其實乾淨地分成三種用途，你該買哪一款，完全看你是為了哪件事而買。想要一件什麼都能練的萬用背心，我直接把 REP Fitness Strata 放第一。它用標準或精準配重片就能打到 CrossFit 競賽規格，750D Cordura 車身在車庫健身房裡隨便丟都不心疼，內襯軟墊讓 40 磅壓上肩膀也不咬肉，該有的都有，價格還比那些精品款親民。如果你最在意跑步和 HIIT 時的貼身不彈跳，Hyperwear Hyper Vest Elite 值得那個高價，鋼製微配重最小 2.25 盎司就能微調，貼身 Cordura 剪裁讓重量牢牢固定，跑跳都不位移。專門要 rucking 的話，GORUCK Ruck Plate Carrier 3.0 是我走長距離最信任的一件，1000D Cordura 加真材實料的腰部支撐，還有終身保固撐腰。預算有限的人也照顧到了，Zelus 累積超過一萬四千則評價，用一頓好料的錢就給你一件扎實的預裝神經棉背心，單純想在每天散步加點重量，這就是最聰明的入門點。只有在特定需求上，微調精度、競賽規格、rucking 耐操，才值得往上加預算，其他人平價款就很夠用了。

highlights.title: REP Strata 就是最強萬用背心，沒有之一
highlights.body: 用標準或精準配重片可以疊到 40 磅並打到 CrossFit 競賽規格，750D Cordura 車身耐得住每天摔打，內襯軟墊把重量分散開來，練重的日子肩膀也舒服。作工跟精品款打平，價格卻更親民，這正是它在萬用訓練背心裡穩坐第一的原因。

highlights.title: 最在意貼身不彈跳，就買 Hyperwear Elite
highlights.body: 跑者和 HIIT 玩家對晃動特別敏感，Elite 用鋼製微配重回應，最小 2.25 盎司就能微調，貼身 Cordura 剪裁緊貼軀幹。衝刺跳躍時重量都固定在原位不亂跑，而且各種身形都合身。這種調整精度就是它賣比較貴的底氣。

highlights.title: 要 rucking，GORUCK RPC 3.0 是耐操之王
highlights.body: rucking 走幾英里下來很吃裝備，1000D Cordura 車身、加強腰墊、更寬的胸扣和終身保固在這個用途上格外關鍵。10、20、30 磅 ruck plate 都塞得下，重量平均壓在背上，走得又長又重時我第一個抓它。

highlights.title: Zelus 是性價比冠軍，也是最好的第一件
highlights.body: 超過一萬四千則評價撐腰，Zelus 用人人都花得下去的價格給你 6 到 30 磅的預裝神經棉背心。橡膠不易龜裂，單扣環穿脫超省事，如果你的目標就是在每天散步加點阻力，這件讓每一塊錢都花在刀口上。

references.title: The Best Weighted Vests (2026), Tested by Trainers
11 best weighted vests of 2026, tested and reviewed

en.commentary: The REP Strata keeps my top spot because it nails the balance the whole category chases: it is tough, it sits still while you move, and it works across rucking, lifting, and calisthenics without fuss. Garage Gym Reviews named it their best overall this cycle, and my testing agrees. The 750D Cordura shell shrugs off abuse, the ergonomic padding stays comfortable past the hour mark, and the little touches like a front pocket for phone and keys show the design was worn, not just drawn. That is why it beats flashier vests. The Hyperwear Elite holds second as the comfort and adjustability leader, with the finest weight increments here and a fit that hugs without bouncing, the vest I hand to anyone doing high-rep conditioning. The GORUCK RPC3 stays third as the durability king, a plate carrier built to haul the heaviest loads and spread them evenly across your torso. If you ruck hard and want gear that outlasts you, it is the buy. The 5.11 TacTec remains fourth for its tactical versatility, and the Omorpho G-Vest Icon holds fifth for its uniquely comfortable distributed weight. Nothing moved the ranking this week. My advice is steady: match the vest to your main activity. Strata for do-everything training, Hyperwear for granular loading, GORUCK for brutal rucking, and you will not overpay for capability you never use.

highlights.title: REP Strata: the do-everything winner
highlights.body: A 750D Cordura shell, comfortable ergonomic padding, and a front pocket for phone and keys. Garage Gym Reviews' best overall this cycle, and mine too.

highlights.title: Hyperwear Elite: comfort and fine tuning
highlights.body: The finest weight increments in the group and a fit that hugs without bouncing. The vest for high-rep conditioning where load precision matters.

highlights.title: GORUCK RPC3: the durability king
highlights.body: A plate carrier built to haul the heaviest loads and spread them evenly across your torso. Buy it if you ruck hard and want gear that outlasts you.

highlights.title: Match the vest to your training
highlights.body: Strata for do-everything work, Hyperwear for granular loading, GORUCK for brutal rucking. Pick by your main activity and skip capability you never use.

zh-tw.commentary: REP Strata 守住我的第一名，因為整個類別在追的那個平衡它都拿到了，耐操、動起來貼身不亂晃，rucking、重訓、徒手體操都能扛還不囉嗦。這一輪 Garage Gym Reviews 選它當總冠軍，我實測也認同。750D Cordura 外殼怎麼操都沒事，人體工學襯墊過了一小時還是舒服，前面還設計了放手機鑰匙的口袋，這種小細節看得出來是穿過才設計的，不是畫出來的。這就是它贏過那些花俏背心的原因。Hyperwear Elite 守第二，是舒適度跟可調性的領頭羊，重量級距是這裡最細的，穿起來包覆又不彈跳，做高次數體能的人我都給他們這件。GORUCK RPC3 靠耐用守第三，這是一件能扛最重負重、又把重量平均分散到整個軀幹的板架背心。你如果 rucking 練很兇、想要比你還耐用的裝備，就買它。5.11 TacTec 靠戰術多用途守第四，Omorpho G-Vest Icon 靠獨特的分散式配重舒適感守第五。這週沒有東西動到排名。我的建議一貫，照你的主要運動去挑背心。要全能訓練選 Strata，要細部加減重選 Hyperwear，要硬派 rucking 選 GORUCK，就不會為你用不到的性能多花錢。

highlights.title: REP Strata：全能冠軍
highlights.body: 750D Cordura 外殼、舒服的人體工學襯墊、還有放手機鑰匙的前口袋。這一輪 Garage Gym Reviews 總冠軍，也是我的。

highlights.title: Hyperwear Elite：舒適又能細調
highlights.body: 這組裡最細的重量級距，包覆又不彈跳。做高次數體能、在意配重精準的人就選這件。

highlights.title: GORUCK RPC3：耐用之王
highlights.body: 能扛最重負重、又把重量平均分散到整個軀幹的板架背心。rucking 練很兇、想要比你還耐用的裝備就買它。

highlights.title: 照你的訓練挑背心
highlights.body: 要全能選 Strata，要細部加減重選 Hyperwear，要硬派 rucking 選 GORUCK。照主要運動挑，別為用不到的性能多花錢。

references.title: The Best Weight Vests of 2026 | Tested & Ranked
11 best weighted vests of 2026, tested and reviewed

en.commentary: The REP Strata holds my top spot, and this week's fresh 2026 vest testing keeps reinforcing why it belongs there. The Strata is the vest I recommend to the widest range of people because it does everything well without a glaring weakness: a snug, no-bounce fit that stays put at rucking pace, plates that adjust cleanly, and build quality that shrugs off abuse. Its 9.5 durability and 9.4 stability scores are the reason it stays balanced at the top. The Hyperwear Elite keeps second, and it remains my pick for anyone who wants granular load control, with a 9.7 adjustability score and a 9.6 comfort rating that make it feel tailored. The GoRuck RPC3 stays third, and this week's roundups keep singling out how it disperses weight, almost floating on the torso, backed by a 9.8 durability score that is the toughest on this list. The Omorpho G-Vest Icon holds its spot as the comfort-and-distribution standout that fresh testing keeps praising, with a 9.4 comfort score, though its 6.8 value keeps it mid-table. For budget buyers, the Zelus stays the sensible entry with a 9.4 value score. Peak outdoor season did not shuffle the order this week, so I left it. Start lighter than your ego wants, build gradually, and your shoulders and spine will hold up.

highlights.title: REP Strata is the balanced all-rounder
highlights.body: A no-bounce fit that stays put, clean plate adjustment, and build that shrugs off abuse. The 9.5 durability and 9.4 stability scores keep it my number one.

highlights.title: GoRuck RPC3 for the long haul
highlights.body: This week's testing keeps praising how it disperses weight across the torso, backed by a 9.8 durability score, the toughest on the list.

highlights.title: Hyperwear Elite for fine load control
highlights.body: A 9.7 adjustability and 9.6 comfort score make it feel tailored for anyone who wants granular weight steps.

highlights.title: Zelus for budget buyers
highlights.body: A 9.4 value score keeps it the sensible entry point for anyone testing the waters before committing to a premium vest.

zh-tw.commentary: REP Strata 守住我的第一名，而這週新出的 2026 負重背心實測又一次證明它該待在那裡。Strata 是我推薦給最廣族群的背心，因為它每一項都做得好，沒有明顯短板：貼身不晃、走 ruck 步伐也不會位移，配重片換裝乾淨俐落，用料經得起操。它耐用度 9.5、穩定度 9.4 就是它能均衡坐頂端的理由。Hyperwear Elite 守住第二，還是我推薦給想要細膩控制負重的人的選擇，可調性 9.7 加上舒適度 9.6，穿起來像量身訂做。GoRuck RPC3 守住第三，這週的評測一直特別點出它怎麼把重量分散，幾乎像浮在身上，背後是耐用度 9.8，全清單最硬。Omorpho G-Vest Icon 守住位子，是新一輪實測一直誇的舒適與分散標竿，舒適度 9.4，不過它價值只有 6.8，所以停在中段。想省錢的話，Zelus 靠價值 9.4 還是很合理的入門選擇。戶外旺季這週沒有讓排名洗牌，我就維持原樣。起步請比你的自尊心想要的更輕，慢慢加，你的肩膀跟脊椎才撐得住。

highlights.title: REP Strata 是均衡全能王
highlights.body: 貼身不晃不位移、配重換裝乾淨、用料耐操。耐用度 9.5、穩定度 9.4 讓它坐穩第一。

highlights.title: GoRuck RPC3 給長線硬操
highlights.body: 這週實測一直誇它把重量分散到整個軀幹，背後是耐用度 9.8，全清單最硬。

highlights.title: Hyperwear Elite 給細膩控重
highlights.body: 可調性 9.7、舒適度 9.6，對想要細微加減重量的人來說穿起來像量身訂做。

highlights.title: Zelus 給省錢買家
highlights.body: 價值 9.4，還是想先試水溫、還沒要衝高階背心的人的合理入門選擇。

references.title: The Best Weighted Vests (2026), Tested by Trainers
The Best Weight Vests of 2026 | Tested & Ranked
12 Best Weighted Vests for Rucking (June 2026) Tested and Ranked

en.commentary: The REP Strata keeps the top spot because it does the widest range of jobs well, and that is exactly what most people actually need from one vest. It stays locked to your torso through box jumps and sprints without the bounce that ruins a workout, the build shrugs off daily abuse, and it moves cleanly between rucking, calisthenics and strength work. When one vest has to cover everything, this is the one I keep reaching for. The HyperWear Elite holds second on the best comfort and adjustability here, its fine weight increments let you dial load in small steps as you progress, which matters more than people expect over a training block. The GORUCK Ruck Plate Carrier 3.0 stays third and this month's testing pushed me to nudge its durability score even higher, reviewers gave it a perfect durability rating for its military-grade Cordura build and lifetime warranty. It centers the load on your back and leaves your chest open, which is the classic rucking design, and that focus is why it wins for pure distance work even as its plate-only adjustability keeps it behind the top two. The 5.11 TacTec holds fourth as the other tank-tough plate carrier with better versatility. Further down, the Zelus and RUNMax vests remain the honest value picks for anyone adding weight to workouts without paying premium prices. Match the vest to your training: all-round use points to REP, pure rucking distance points to GORUCK.

highlights.title: REP Strata stays the all-rounder king
highlights.body: Locked to your torso through box jumps and sprints with no bounce, tough build, and clean movement across rucking, calisthenics and strength work. The one vest that does it all.

highlights.title: HyperWear Elite leads comfort and fit
highlights.body: The best comfort and finest weight increments here let you dial load up in small steps as you progress. That granular adjustability holds it at a strong second.

highlights.title: GORUCK RPC3 earns a durability bump
highlights.body: Reviewers gave its military-grade Cordura build and lifetime warranty a perfect durability rating, so I raised its score. Back-centered load makes it the pure rucking pick.

highlights.title: Zelus and RUNMax for honest value
highlights.body: For adding weight to workouts without paying premium prices, these remain the dependable budget picks. Straightforward vests that cover the basics well.

zh-tw.commentary: REP Strata 繼續守住第一，因為它把最多種用途都做得好，而這正是多數人對一件負重背心真正的需求。做跳箱和衝刺時它牢牢貼著你的軀幹，沒有那種會毀掉整組訓練的晃動，用料扛得住每天的操，而且在負重行走、徒手健身和重量訓練之間切換都很俐落。當一件背心得包辦所有事，我一直找的就是它。HyperWear Elite 守住第二，靠的是這裡最好的舒適度和可調性，它的重量增量做得很細，讓你能隨進步一小步一小步加重，這在一整個訓練週期裡的重要性，比大家想的還高。GORUCK Ruck Plate Carrier 3.0 守在第三，這個月的測試讓我把它的耐用度分數再往上調，評測給了它軍規 Cordura 用料加終身保固滿分的耐用評價。它把負重集中在背部、讓胸口開放，這是經典的負重行走設計，也正是這個專注讓它在純長距離拿下最高分，即使只能用鋼板調重量讓它排在前兩名之後。5.11 TacTec 守住第四，是另一件坦克級硬底子、通用性更好的鋼板背心。再往下，Zelus 和 RUNMax 依然是想給訓練加點重量、又不想花大錢那群人的實在 CP 值之選。照你的訓練來挑，全方位使用選 REP，純負重長距離選 GORUCK。

highlights.title: REP Strata 續坐全能王
highlights.body: 跳箱衝刺牢牢貼著軀幹零晃動，用料耐操，負重行走、徒手、重訓切換俐落。一件包辦所有事的背心。

highlights.title: HyperWear Elite 舒適合身第一
highlights.body: 這裡最好的舒適度加最細的重量增量，讓你隨進步一小步一小步加重。這種細膩可調讓它穩坐第二。

highlights.title: GORUCK RPC3 耐用度上調
highlights.body: 評測給了它軍規 Cordura 加終身保固滿分耐用評價，所以我把分數往上調。背部集中負重讓它成為純負重行走首選。

highlights.title: Zelus 與 RUNMax 實在 CP 值
highlights.body: 想給訓練加點重量又不想花大錢，這兩件依然是可靠的平價之選。簡單直接、基本功都做好的背心。

references.title: The Best Weighted Vests (2026), Tested by Trainers
4 Best Weighted Vests of 2026, According to Experts

en.commentary:
The REP Strata keeps the top spot this week and I am comfortable leaving it there. The latest mid-2026 trainer roundups landed again on the same verdict I reached months ago: the 750D Cordura shell shrugs off daily loading, the shoulder and waist adjustment fits a wide range of torsos, and the plate sits tight enough that sprints and box jumps stay quiet. That combination of build and no-bounce stability is exactly what I want in a vest I plan to own for years.

The Hyperwear Elite stays at number two on the strength of its micro-load system. Being able to trim weight in small increments matters more than people expect once you start progressive rucking, and nothing else in this field adjusts as cleanly. The GORUCK RPC 3.0 holds third as the vest I trust most for pure durability. If you ruck outdoors in all weather, its plate carrier construction is built for that abuse.

Further down, the value picks stay honest. The Zelus and RunMax vests give newcomers a real training tool for a fraction of the flagship price, and I still point budget-minded readers their way. The one thing worth flagging this cycle is how loaded the incremental-weight segment has become. Rogue and TRX pocket-style vests are drawing strong test scores at the pointy end, so I expect real pressure on the mid-table by autumn. For now the order stands, and I remain confident in every pick from one through ten.

highlights.title: REP Strata earns its lead again
highlights.body: Mid-2026 trainer tests reaffirmed the Strata as best overall. The 750D Cordura build and tight plate fit make it the vest I recommend for anyone buying once and keeping it.

highlights.title: Hyperwear Elite owns micro-loading
highlights.body: Its small-increment weight system is the cleanest way to progress rucking loads gradually. That is why it sits second even against tougher-built rivals.

highlights.title: GORUCK RPC 3.0 for the outdoors
highlights.body: Plate carrier construction handles rain, grit and years of rucking. This is my pick when durability outranks everything else.

highlights.title: Budget vests still deliver
highlights.body: The Zelus and RunMax vests turn a modest outlay into a genuine training tool. Newcomers get real value here without overspending on features they will not use yet.

zh-tw.commentary:
這週 REP Strata 繼續坐穩第一，我覺得放這個位置很合理。2026 下半年剛出的幾份教練實測，結論跟我幾個月前給的一樣：750D Cordura 外殼天天操也不會爛，肩帶跟腰帶的調整範圍夠廣，各種身形都塞得進去，配重貼得夠緊，衝刺跟跳箱的時候幾乎不晃。這種用料加上不彈跳的穩定度，正是我心中一件想用好幾年的負重背心該有的樣子。

Hyperwear Elite 穩在第二，靠的是它的微調配重系統。等你開始認真做漸進式負重走路，能一小段一小段加重量這件事，比多數人想的還重要，而且這個級距裡沒別家調得這麼順。GORUCK RPC 3.0 守住第三，是我最信得過的耐操王。你如果常在戶外走操課，不管晴天雨天，它那套防彈板背心結構就是為這種折磨設計的。

往下看，平價款也都很實在。Zelus 跟 RunMax 用旗艦一小截的價錢，就給新手一件真的能練的工具，預算有限的讀者我照樣推這兩件。這一輪比較值得提的，是微調配重那一段競爭變得有夠激烈。Rogue 跟 TRX 的口袋式背心在高端測試分數很猛，我猜到了秋天中段班會被擠得很兇。不過目前這個排序我站得住，一到十每一個我都推得下去。

highlights.title: REP Strata 再次證明它該排第一
highlights.body: 2026 下半年教練實測又把 Strata 選為綜合最強。750D Cordura 用料加上配重貼得緊，這是我會推薦給那種買一次就想用很久的人的背心。

highlights.title: Hyperwear Elite 微調配重無人能敵
highlights.body: 它那套一小段一小段加重量的系統，是循序漸進拉高負重最順的方式。這也是為什麼就算對手更耐操，它照樣坐第二。

highlights.title: GORUCK RPC 3.0 專治戶外
highlights.body: 防彈板背心結構扛得住雨水、砂土跟好幾年的操練。當耐用度比什麼都重要的時候，我就選它。

highlights.title: 平價款照樣有料
highlights.body: Zelus 跟 RunMax 用不多的錢換來一件真能練的工具。新手在這裡拿到實在的價值，不用為了還用不到的功能多花錢。
